work_unit: QM5_13020 Q02 market-neutral FX infra reroute

prior_infra_failure.diagnosis: The Q02 evidence contained three empty MT5 runs with no report/expert/symbol details. Local history was present, so this was routed as terminal/report infrastructure rather than a missing-data strategy failure.

cache_audit.summary: AUDNZD.DWX D1 history spans 2017-2026; daily tester cache exists on non-T1 factory terminals including T2/T3/T4/T5/T7/T10.

farm_db_update.priority_reason: board-advisor market-neutral FX Q02 infra reroute: AUDNZD.DWX history/cache exists but prior T1 run emitted empty MT5 reports misclassified as NO_HISTORY

execution.reason: The paced terminal worker consumes avoid_terminals during atomic claim; the row was left pending for the factory fleet to claim without adding CPU load.

post_update_claim_observation.interpretation: The paced worker claimed the row on an allowed non-T1 terminal after the reroute.

verification.result: pre-existing unrelated dirty files observed; scoped artifact added only

verification.command: sqlite conditional update of pending Q02 row
verification.result: 1 row updated; row was pending and unclaimed immediately after the mutation

verification.command: sqlite post-update read of pending Q02 row
verification.result: paced worker claimed the row on T3 with avoid_terminals=['T1']
